channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: J Balvin Reminded Sueños Festival 2026 Why OG Status Still Has Muscle
item.description: 🔥 OG vibes in full force as @JBALVIN dominates Sueños Festival 2026! 💪🎵 #LatinMusic #JBalvin #SueñosFestival

item.title: Charli xcx Shares Pop-Punk Track ‘Playboy Bunny’ as B-Side to ‘SS26’
item.description: 🎸 Dive into Charli XCX's punk side with her new track 'Playboy Bunny'! Rock on! 🤘 #CharliXCX #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Shakira & Burna Boy Drop ‘Dai Dai’ Video Featuring Cameos From World Cup Winners Messi & Mbappé: Watch
item.description: 🚀 Kick off your day with the ultimate collab! 🔥 Shake it like Shakira & Burna Boy alongside soccer champs Messi & Mbappé in ‘Dai Dai’ video! 🎶⚽ #NewMusicVideo

item.title: Neil Young Makes Surprise Live Return At Vancouver Benefit Show
item.description: Guess who's back, back again? Neil Young hits the stage in Vancouver for a surprise performance! 🎸🎉 #RockLegend #NeilYoung

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Keeps Hope and Dreams Alive on Tour: 10 Best Moments From Cleveland
item.description: Rock on with The Boss! 🎸🎶 Bruce Springsteen's Cleveland tour highlights will give you all the feels! #TheBoss #MusicMagic
